entity.summary: Multi-product decentralized trading hub on Kava EVM and Base combining V2 and V3 spot exchanges, swaps, limit orders, liquidity pools, farms, voting, and perpetual markets.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation presents Kinetix as an active DeFi hub on Kava EVM and Base. Its current product suite includes V2 and V3 DEX deployments, swaps, liquidity, farms, voting, and perpetual exchanges. The swap guide documents both market and limit swaps through the live application. No exact launch date or legal jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: Kinetix product suite
evidence.notes: First-party documentation lists the current Kinetix product suite, including V2 and V3 DEXs, swaps, perpetual exchanges, voting pools, farms, bridges, and aggregated statistics.

evidence.title: Kinetix swap guide
evidence.notes: First-party guide links the live swap application and documents wallet connection, market swaps, limit swaps, asset selection, pricing, amounts, and slippage controls.
